title: fdb_to_grib configuration
description: Configuration for extracting GRIB files from FDB with fdb_to_grib.py.

model.description: Model name. class, stream and expver are derived automatically.

type.description: MARS type. Typical values: cf (control forecast), pf (perturbed forecast), an (analysis).

date_range.description: Inclusive date range for the request.

start.description: Start date in YYYYMMDD format, e.g. '20250101'.

end.description: End date in YYYYMMDD format, e.g. '20250103' (inclusive).

items.description: Run time in HHMM format, e.g. '0000', '1200'.

times.description: List of run times in HHMM format.

steps.description: Global step specification. Can be a list or a range. Applies to all blocks unless overridden per block.

blocks.description: One block per levtype. Each block specifies which params (and optionally levels) to retrieve.

items.description: Any GRIB metadata key, e.g. date, time, step, levtype, param, level.

group_by.description: Fields sharing the same values for these keys are written to the same output file.

output_dir.description: Root directory for output files. Created automatically if it does not exist.

output_template.description: Filename template relative to output_dir. Uses group_by keys as {variable} placeholders. Slashes create subdirectories. Defaults to '{key1}_{key2}_....grib'.

range.description: Arithmetic sequence expressed as a range.

unit.description: Time unit suffix. Use 'm' for minute-based steps (e.g. 0m/to/1440m/by/10m). Omit for hours.

oneOf.description: Explicit list of level values (floats allowed, e.g. for depth levels).

levtype.description: Level type: sfc (surface), ml (model levels), pl (pressure levels), dp (depth), hl (height above sea).

levels.description: Levels to retrieve (levelist). Required for ml, pl, dp, hl. Must be omitted for sfc.

steps.description: Steps for this block only. Overrides the global steps. Useful when different levtypes use different step units (e.g. hourly vs minute-based).
